description:
You are a retail investor using JStock to track your stock portfolio. Your portfolio ('My Portfolio') currently contains three buy positions:

- AAPL (Apple Inc.): 100 shares bought at $185.20 on Jan 15, 2024
- MSFT (Microsoft Corp.): 50 shares bought at $374.50 on Jan 15, 2024
- NVDA (NVIDIA Corp.): 25 shares bought at $615.30 on Feb 1, 2024

Apple stock has appreciated significantly, and you want to take partial profits. Record a sell transaction in the portfolio for 40 shares of AAPL at $225.75 per share dated March 15, 2024. The transaction should be saved and persist in the portfolio's sell records.
